title: Revenue Proposals
summary: This is a navigation page on Treasury.gov that lists links to the General Explanations of the Administration's Revenue Proposals for FY2025 (released March 2024) and prior fiscal years back to 1991. The page does not contain the actual revenue proposal content—only references to accompanying budget documents, Excel tables, and prior year archives.
key_points: Page is a navigation/listing page containing only links, not actual policy content
FY2025 Revenue Proposals released March 2024 per the source
FY2025 documents include Revenue Table Only (Excel), Advancing Equity through the Tax Code
Prior year documents available from FY2024 back to FY1991
No specific revenue proposal details, figures, or tax policy changes are stated on this page
The actual substantive content would be in linked PDF or Excel documents, not on this page
why_it_matters: This page serves as an index to Treasury revenue proposal documents but contains no actionable information. Actual macro catalyst potential would depend on the content of linked FY2025 budget documents, which are not present in this source body.

issues_found: Source is a navigation/listing page containing only links, not substantive policy content
Source type is incorrectly labeled as 'unknown' - it should be 'navigation_page' per Core Rule 5

notes: Per Core Rule 6: PAGE_TYPE appears to be a navigation_page, which should be treated as non-archiveable. The actual policy content exists in linked PDFs and Excel tables (e.g., FY2025 General Explanations of the Administration's Revenue Proposals), which are not present in this source. For macro catalyst research, the linked budget documents would be the appropriate archive targets.
